title: Innovative Light Moroccan Pretzels Kefta Tagine
description: A lacto-vegetarian friendly Moroccan dish featuring pretzels, beurre-monte, and kefta in a dolsot-stone-bowl, this recipe is a unique twist on traditional tagine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the kefta spice mix, olive oil, chopped onion, and minced garlic.
Add the sliced pretzels to the bowl and toss to coat with the kefta mixture.
Transfer the pretzel mixture to a dolsot-stone-bowl and bake for 10 minutes.
In a small saucepan, heat the beurre-monte over low heat until melted.
Add the vegetable broth and yogurt to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Pour the beurre-monte sauce over the pretzel mixture in the dolsot-stone-bowl.
Return the dolsot-stone-bowl to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the dolsot-stone-bowl from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
